title: Transform the way you hire.
text:
CreateInviteOptimizeSelectInsightsHire

Features

# Transform the way you hire.

Tools to help you make hiring decisions based on merit, not background.

Book a Demo

Vervoe features hero composite screenshot

Create

## Assessment Creation

Vervoe lets you create a completely unique assessment that's tailored specifically to suit the requirements of the role you're hiring for.

Assessment Creation product screenshot

### Content Library

Choose from a library of more than 300 skills-based assessments, each one ready to customize for your role.

### AI Assessment Builder

Upload a job description and let AI instantly generate a tailored assessment - ready to preview, tweak, and send.

### Anti-cheating

Built-in anti-cheating measures keep your process honest - tab-switch detection, identity checks, and randomized questions.

### Screening

Filter out unsuitable applicants early with quick screening questions that catch non-negotiables before skills testing.

### Question Types

Pick from a wide range of interactive question types - video answers, code tasks, spreadsheets, multiple choice, and more.

Invite

## Workflow integration

Don't just send candidates a link to an assessment - improve your entire hiring process with seamless integrations and create a leading candidate experience that engages and delights your applicants.

Workflow integration product screenshot

### Candidate Messaging

Keep candidates informed at every step with automated messages that feel personal, not transactional.

### Branded Assessments

Add your logo, colors, and tone so every assessment feels like a natural extension of your employer brand.

### Integrations

Connect Vervoe to your ATS, HRIS, and workflow tools - Greenhouse, Lever, SmartRecruiters, Zapier, and more.

### Job links and email

Invite candidates via shareable job links, direct email invitations, or embed the assessment in your careers page.

Optimize

## Artificial Intelligence

Vervoe's machine-learning models watch how your best candidates answer and use that signal to rank new applicants against the same bar.

Every response runs through the same AI - so grading is consistent, bias is reduced, and your top performers keep surfacing first.

Artificial Intelligence product screenshot

### Vervoe's AI

Vervoe's AI learns from your top performers and applies the same judgement across every candidate, at any volume.

### Personalized Grading

Train the model to match your team's standards - it gets smarter with every assessment you run.

Select

## Grading and Results

Move beyond resumes. Vervoe grades every candidate response automatically, ranks them by skill fit, and surfaces the top matches in a scoreable shortlist.

Your hiring team gets clear, explainable signal - with the option to review video and written answers side by side, leave notes, and move fast.

Grading and Results product screenshot

### Automatic Grading and Ranking

Every answer is graded and ranked automatically, so candidates surface based on skill, not submission order.

### Insights

Drill into each candidate with detailed score breakdowns, response playback, and skill-level benchmarks.

### Candidate Feedback

Close the loop with candidates by sharing automated, personalized feedback - even when they miss the mark.

### Team Tools

Collaborate with hiring managers in one place - leave comments, tag teammates, and agree on shortlists faster.

Insights

## On demand reporting

Every assessment you run surfaces a live set of reports - completion rates, score distribution, and question-level signal - so you can see exactly how candidates are performing.

Share reports with stakeholders or export them to prove the health of your hiring process.

On demand reporting product screenshot

### Completions

See how many candidates started, finished, or dropped off - and where your assessment is losing them.

### Score Distribution

Track score spread across your candidate pool and spot patterns that reveal the strongest hires.

### Question by Question

Review performance on every question to refine your assessment and sharpen the signal you get from candidates.

Integrations

### Workflow integration

Integrate Vervoe with the tools you already use. Connect to Greenhouse, Lever, SmartRecruiters and more directly, or connect to 1,000+ other apps via Zapier to fit Vervoe into any workflow.

Vervoe integrations logos

Vervoe API

### Integrate your way

Need deeper control? Use the Vervoe API to build custom integrations with your in-house tools, your ATS, or any workflow that makes your team move faster.

Learn more about our API

Hire

## Closing the loop

Once you've picked your winners, Vervoe helps you move them into offer, onboarding, and your talent pool - keeping every past candidate close for future roles.

Closing the loop product screenshot

### Hire

Move chosen candidates straight into your ATS or offer workflow with a single click.

### Talent Pools

Keep strong applicants in a talent pool for future roles - re-engage them when the right opportunity opens.

## Your complete solution for skills testing

### Assessment insights

See how candidates are moving through your assessment with detailed link-level analytics and timing.

### Timed questions and tests

Add time limits to individual questions or entire assessments to simulate real-world pressure.

### Share candidate cards

Share scored candidate profiles with hiring managers for fast, collaborative decisions.

### File upload

Let candidates upload documents, portfolios, or work samples straight into the assessment.

### Candidate status

Track every candidate in one place with clear status and stage indicators at a glance.

### Mobile friendly

Every assessment is fully responsive so candidates can complete tasks from any device.

## Ready to transform the way you hire?

Create your free Vervoe account and start building merit-based assessments today.

Get started
